com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model.random

Class Amount

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model.random.Amount

  • public class Amount
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents an amount of something, which can be a fixed number or a range.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static Amount MAX_VALUE 
      static Amount ONE 

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Amount(int of)
      Creates an Amount with a fixed value.
      Amount(int from, int to)
      Creates an Amount with a range from 'from' to 'to'.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int get()
      Gets a random value from the range defined by this Amount.
      boolean isFixed()
      Checks if this Amount represents a fixed value (i.e., from and to are the same).
      static Amount of(java.lang.String amount)
      Parses a string representation of an Amount.
      java.lang.String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this Amount.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

    • Field Detail

      • MAX_VALUE

        public static final Amount MAX_VALUE

      • ONE

        public static final Amount ONE

    • Constructor Detail

      • Amount

        public Amount(int from,
              int to)
        Creates an Amount with a range from 'from' to 'to'. The order of 'from' and 'to' does not matter.
        Parameters:
        from - the lower bound of the range
        to - the upper bound of the range

      • Amount

        public Amount(int of)
        Creates an Amount with a fixed value.
        Parameters:
        of - the fixed value

    • Method Detail

      • get

        public int get()
        Gets a random value from the range defined by this Amount. If the Amount is fixed, it returns that fixed value.
        Returns:
        a random value from the range or the fixed value

      • of

        public static Amount of(java.lang.String amount)
                 throws java.lang.NumberFormatException
        Parses a string representation of an Amount. The string can be a single number (e.g., "5"), a range (e.g., "3-7"), or "ALL" for the maximum value.
        Parameters:
        amount - the string representation of the Amount
        Returns:
        the parsed Amount object
        Throws:
        java.lang.NumberFormatException - if the string is not in a valid format

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Returns a string representation of this Amount. If this Amount is the MAX_VALUE, it returns "ALL". If 'from' and 'to' are the same, it returns that single value as a string. Otherwise, it returns "from-to".
        Overrides:
        toString in class java.lang.Object
        Returns:
        a string representation of this Amount

      • isFixed

        public boolean isFixed()
        Checks if this Amount represents a fixed value (i.e., from and to are the same).
        Returns:
        true if this Amount is fixed, false otherwise
